title: Buttery Crunchy Vietnamese Ginger Crumble
description: An adventurous low-carb-friendly Vietnamese dish featuring mixed peel and ferment in a buttery, crumbly texture.

ingredients.name: ferment (optional)
ingredients.amount: 1 packet of ferment or 2 tbsp of starter culture

instructions: Peel and grate the ginger into a large mixing bowl.
Add mixed peel to the bowl, followed by grated ginger.
If using ferment, add it now. Mix thoroughly with your hands or wooden spoon until combined well.
In another bowl, mix coconut oil, egg whites, and baking powder together until smooth.
Gradually fold in coconut mixture into the ginger-peel mixture until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Transfer the crumble into a greased dish. Bake at 350°F for about 20-30 minutes or until golden brown on top and crispy underneath.
